title: Cronos Group Q4 2024 Earnings - Revenue Growth and Stock Performance
text: Cronos demonstrated strong financial performance in Q4 2024. Annual revenue increased 35% to $117.6 million, with Q4 specifically showing a 27% year-over-year increase to $30.3 million. The company exceeded prior year results despite missing analyst forecasts of $33.93 million. Growth was primarily driven by cannabis flower and extract sales in Canada, plus expanded sales in Israel and international markets. The company achieved significant operational efficiency gains with adjusted gross margin improved by 12 percentage points to 26%, nearly doubling from the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA improved 45% year-over-year and operating expenses declined $5 million compared to 2023. Management provided cautious guidance for the coming year expecting flat operating expenses in 2025 even with GrowCo's operations. The expanded GrowCo facility is expected to begin generating supply in the second half of 2025. The company maintains a strong cash position of $859 million, positioning it for international expansion in Germany and the UK. Despite missing revenue forecasts, the stock rose 4.86% in premarket trading, suggesting investor confidence in operational trajectory.
